eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Midland, TX; at 7:09 AM on JUN 12, 2026 Effective until 10:09 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Active shooter event in place. Stay indoors. Do not enter this area in vehicle or on foot. Active shooter event in place. Stay indoors. Do not enter this area in vehicle or on foot.
